idea-plugin.name: Slatewave
idea-plugin.description:
A dark JetBrains theme built around a slate foundation and a teal signature, with sky, rose, purple, and amber accents pulled directly from the matching Slatewave palette.

Designed so the terminal prompt and editor chrome feel like one continuous surface. Ships both the UI theme and a matching editor color scheme — tuned for WebStorm, GoLand, and the rest of the IntelliJ-based IDE family.

Slate below, teal above.
